body:
## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage — Needs Manual Review

<details>
<summary>🏷️ Label Decision</summary>

- **Candidate labels considered:**
  - `Client` + `Monitor - Distro` — The `Azure.Monitor.OpenTelemetry.AspNetCore` package maps to the `Monitor - Distro` service label (confirmed by CODEOWNERS and reference issues such as #58287, #57465). Category would be `Client`.
  - `Client` + `Monitor - Exporter` — The `Azure.Monitor.OpenTelemetry.Exporter` package maps to the `Monitor - Exporter` service label (confirmed by CODEOWNERS entry at line 350). Category would be `Client`.
- **Confidence blockers:** The issue title and body explicitly name **both** packages equally (`Azure.Monitor.OpenTelemetry.AspNetCore 1.4.0` and `Azure.Monitor.OpenTelemetry.Exporter 1.7.0`). Two service labels are equally plausible and cannot be narrowed to exactly one — this blocks confidence per the "no ambiguity between multiple services" criterion.
- **Outcome:** Applied `needs-triage` — could not confidently predict a single service label.
</details>

<details>
<summary>👥 Owner Routing</summary>

- **CODEOWNERS scan:** Owner lookup was not performed — label prediction did not reach confidence threshold.
</details>
